infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Palava Hub needs camera access to let you go live and post photos.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Palava Hub needs microphone access for live video sessions.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Palava Hub needs access to save photos to your camera roll.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Palava Hub needs access to your photos to let you share images.

plugins.cameraPermission: Palava Hub needs camera access to let you go live.
plugins.microphonePermission: Palava Hub needs microphone access for live sessions.

plugins.photosPermission: Palava Hub needs access to save photos to your library.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Palava Hub needs permission to save photos.
